summary: EXP-286 written: defense neutralization for WIN-016 alpha-as-fitted-coefficient steelman (defense_survives=3 per WIN-016.c3 advocate_mode). Single-field insertion into currently-null detail_extra: two paragraphs preempting (1) the retreat from physical-refractive-index to phenomenological-deflection-coefficient framing (granting Kramers-Kronig dodge as real, then showing three demands — derivation/periodicity/achromaticity — survive untouched), and (2) the natural follow-up annual-aether-circulation escape (geometric equivalence to heliocentric kinematics, incompatibility with dome static-disc/fixed-firmament foundation, and WIN-017 Gaia DR3 cross-WIN handcuff). After integration, recommend curmudgeon re-review WIN-016 cycle 4 and downgrade defense_survives 3 → 1 or 2; close ISS-1838 referencing this EXP. Out-of-scope WIN-016.c3 holes (6–29 deg cascade-note range; 'Timestamped before confirming data' verbatim quote fix; #part1 → #p1-18 anchor) noted in EXP integration_notes for separate handling — EXP-286 is scoped strictly to the defense-survives steelman per the expansion-tracker entry.
